meta.title: AREM GROUP – Leader in Multi-Sector Development in Tunisia
meta.description: AREM GROUP is a Tunisian multidisciplinary group founded in 1979, delivering excellence in commerce & distribution, services, hospitality & tourism, and real estate development.
meta.keywords: AREM GROUP, Tunisia, commerce and distribution, services, hospitality, tourism, real estate development, multidisciplinary group
meta.whatsapp: Hello! I’m interested in AREM GROUP services. Can we discuss?

hero.title: AREM GROUP – Leader in Multi-Sector Development in Tunisia
hero.subtitle: Since 1979, delivering excellence in distribution, services, tourism, and real estate
hero.description: A corporate group with a strong track record built on diversification, stability, and sustainable growth.

services.sectionDescription: A diversified group delivering value across commerce & distribution, services, hospitality & tourism, and real estate development.

commerce.title: Commerce & Distribution
commerce.description: We provide end-to-end commerce and distribution solutions including B2B wholesale, retail supply chain management, logistics coordination, and last-mile delivery optimization for businesses of all sizes.
commerce.metaDescription: Professional commerce and distribution solutions for B2B wholesalers, retailers, and supply chain operators.

services.title: Services
services.description: Our comprehensive service portfolio includes business consulting, digital transformation, customer support, financial advisory, and operational outsourcing tailored to your industry needs.
services.metaDescription: Comprehensive business services tailored to your industry, including consulting, support, and operational excellence.

hospitality.title: Hospitality & Tourism
hospitality.description: We offer complete hospitality and tourism management solutions including hotel operations, travel booking systems, guest experience optimization, destination marketing, and tour operator support.
hospitality.metaDescription: Complete hospitality and tourism solutions for hotels, travel agencies, and destination management companies.

realEstate.title: Real Estate Development
realEstate.description: Our real estate development services cover land acquisition, project financing, construction management, property marketing, and residential or commercial asset delivery from concept to completion.
realEstate.metaDescription: Expert real estate development services from land acquisition to project completion, residential and commercial.

industry.title: Industry & Operations
industry.description: We provide industrial and operational solutions including production line optimization, maintenance planning, quality control, facility management, and lean manufacturing implementation.
industry.metaDescription: Industrial and operational solutions to optimize production, maintenance, and facility management.

HotelAndTourisme.title: Hôtellerie et Tourisme
HotelAndTourisme.description: Nous proposons des solutions complètes de gestion hôtelière et touristique, incluant l'exploitation d'hôtels, les systèmes de réservation, l'optimisation de l'expérience client et le marketing de destination.
HotelAndTourisme.metaDescription: Solutions complètes pour l'hôtellerie et le tourisme, adaptées aux hôtels, agences de voyage et gestion de destinations.

PromotionImmobiliere.title: Promotion Immobiliere
PromotionImmobiliere.description: Nos services de promotion immobilière couvrent l'acquisition foncière, le montage financier, la gestion de chantier, la commercialisation et la livraison de projets résidentiels et commerciaux clé en main.
PromotionImmobiliere.metaDescription: Services experts en promotion immobilière, de l'acquisition foncière à la livraison des projets résidentiels et commerciaux.

about.tile1Title: A Tunisian corporate group built on diversification, stability, and sustainable growth.
about.tile2Title: Headquartered in Tunisia with strong positioning across multiple sectors.
about.tile2Description: AREM GROUP operates with a long-term, value-driven mindset
about.tile3Description: Strong networks and dependable commercial operations
about.tileVisionDescription: To create sustainable value in Tunisia through disciplined growth and diversification.
about.tileGovernanceDescription: Clear processes, responsible leadership, long-term resilience
about.tileDiversificationDescription: A portfolio designed to grow across multiple sectors
about.tileSinceDescription: A legacy of execution, reliability, and continuous growth
about.tilePartnershipDescription: Building trust with clients, suppliers, and stakeholders
about.tileImpactDescription: Creating opportunities and contributing to economic development

items.commerceDescription: Our commercial and distribution activities are built on operational reliability, strong networks, and a long-term commitment to performance.
items.servicesDescription: We deliver services with a customer-first mindset, supported by strong after-sales capabilities and operational excellence.
items.hospitalityDescription: AREM GROUP expresses its passion for hospitality and tourism through high-end hotel development and premium guest experiences.
items.realEstateDescription: We support real estate development through strategic sourcing, disciplined execution, and long-term value creation.

items.t1Quote: AREM GROUP is a reliable partner: structured execution, consistent delivery, and a strong commitment to quality.
items.t2Quote: Professional teams and clear governance. Working with AREM GROUP is efficient, transparent, and results-oriented.
items.t3Quote: A strong track record and a long-term vision. AREM GROUP brings stability and growth across multiple sectors.

milestones.title: Our Milestones
milestones.ctaPrefix: For more details about AREM GROUP,

items.m1Desc: Founded in 1979 by Jamel AREM, marking the beginning of AREM GROUP’s journey in commerce and distribution.
items.m2Desc: Expansion into industrial activities through continuous diversification and operational development.
items.m3Desc: Investment in services with a strong focus on customer satisfaction and high-performing after-sales support.
items.m4Desc: Development of premium hospitality projects, reflecting AREM GROUP’s commitment to high-end tourism and guest experience.
items.m5Desc: Entry into real estate development through strategic sourcing and disciplined project execution.
items.m6Desc: A strong positioning across sectors with a consistent focus on stability, governance, and sustainable growth in Tunisia.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.card1Desc: We align on objectives, stakeholders, and priorities to deliver clear, measurable outcomes across our sectors. We structure the roadmap, define key milestones, and ensure execution stays on track.
approach.card2Desc: We execute with discipline and transparency, coordinating teams and resources to deliver reliable results. From planning to rollout, every step is managed with quality and consistency.
approach.card3Desc: We focus on long-term performance: continuous improvement, operational excellence, and sustainable growth. Our commitment is to deliver value that lasts.

footer.title: Ready to build your next growth story with AREM GROUP?
footer.subtitle: Get in touch with our team and discover how we support multi-sector development in Tunisia.
